description: Add input preprocessor module that cleans messy/casual text before routing. Implements slang dictionary, fuzzy spelling correction, intent detection, context buffer, and optional Ollama integration. Wires into mk_entry.cpp before the smart router.
steps: Implement Levenshtein distance fuzzy spelling correction
Implement intent detection returning struct with cleaned_text, detected_intent, confidence, was_modified, original_text
Implement context buffer storing last 5 messages with pronoun resolution
Add optional Ollama integration with fallback
Wire into mk_entry.cpp: include, add to MKSystem, preprocess before routing in REPL and handle_natural_query
acceptance_criteria: input_preprocessor.cpp compiles without errors as part of the unified build
Slang dictionary translates 50+ common abbreviations and shorthand
Fuzzy correction fixes misspellings within Levenshtein distance 1-2 of known keywords
Intent detection identifies questions, commands, learning, greetings, weather, and time intents
Context buffer resolves pronouns from last 5 messages
Ollama integration checks localhost:11434 and falls back gracefully when unavailable
REPL shows (understood: ...) message only when text was modified
Full build succeeds with no errors
